_comment: This file lives at the repo root and ONLY exists to handle the case where Vercel's git integration deploys with Root Directory=/. The actual landing-page config lives in landing/vercel.json. If you set the Vercel project's Root Directory to 'landing' in the dashboard (recommended), this file is ignored.
buildCommand: echo "no-op: this is not a Vercel app — landing page lives in landing/"
